title: Special art treat on Women's Day, 9 August
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An art feast - billed as...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An art feast - billed as an Art and Culture Day - is being offered in Dana Bay on Women’s Day, 9 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - An art feast - billed as an Art and Culture Day - is being offered in Dana Bay on Women’s Day, 9 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The invitation is open to all who enjoy art to enjoy this special treat, which will take place from 09:30 to 16:00.","html":"The invitation is open to all who enjoy art to enjoy this special treat, which will take place from 09:30 to 16:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The opportunity is being offered by the Lifestyle and Art Gallery in Dana Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The gallery held a successful exhibition before Christmas last year.","html":"The gallery held a successful exhibition before Christmas last year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"There will be art and crafts on exhibition and a candle display; demonstrations of working with air-dry clay, bonsai and watercolour; and picture framing tips provided."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Young multi-instrument musician Jovann Rocher will be entertaining in between activities. He will play four musical instruments during the event.","html":"Young multi-instrument musician Jovann Rocher will be entertaining in between activities. He will play four musical instruments during the event."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Guests can also look forward to singing and poetry reading."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is essential to book and register beforehand. To find out about ticket prices, which include refreshments, WhatsApp: 082 819 2173.","html":"It is essential to book and register beforehand. To find out about ticket prices, which include refreshments, WhatsApp: 082 819 2173."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This would make a special Women's Day gift to someone.","html":"This would make a special Women's Day gift to someone."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ABOVE AND BELOW: Some of the pieces on show at December's art exhibition at the gallery.","html":"ABOVE AND BELOW: Some of the pieces on show at December's art exhibition at the gallery. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
